reasoning: ‘Yebo’ means ‘Yes,’ and ‘bafuna ukubona’ means ‘they want to see.’

answer: How is the boy learning to sew?
reasoning: ‘Umfana ufunda ukuthunga njani?’ asks the manner in which the boy is learning to sew.
‘How is the child?’ translates as ‘Umntwana unjani?’
‘We are learning to cook, aren’t we?’ translates to ‘Siyafunda ukupheka, angithi?’
‘Do they want to see the father?’ translates as ‘Bayafuna ukubona ubaba na?’
